dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped '26-week high' to Donchian upper band (dc_upper) as the closest available indicator for highest price over a lookback period. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 which measures volume relative to 20-day average. Entry on close with no confirmation bars (confirmation_bars: 0). Stop loss set at 5% below entry as specified. Exit uses sma_50 crossbelow as primary exit condition per stated rules.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped '26-week high' to Donchian upper band (dc_upper) as the closest available indicator for highest price over a lookback period. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 which measures volume relative to 20-day average. Entry on close with no confirmation bars (confirmation_bars: 0). Stop loss set at 5% below entry as specified. Exit uses sma_50 crossbelow as primary exit condition per stated rules.

source_rule_text: Buy stocks when they reach new highs, not when they are near their lows or consolidation levels, as this correlates with superior market performance.
